blockingIssues.description: Real-time candlestick aggregation buckets by raw second instead of the active timeframe interval (1m/5m/15m/1h/1d), producing incorrect OHLC candles.
Trade updates gated by `timeSec > lastUpdateTimestampRef.current` drop same-second trades, which can miss high/low/close updates.
Transition marker uses `series.setMarkers(...)` with lightweight-charts v5 where marker API should use `createSeriesMarkers(...)`; the New Venue marker does not render.

appliedUpdates.description: Added GeckoTerminal OHLCV retention behavior note to `.factory/library/geckoterminal-history-retention.md`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure mission feature `skillName` values are validated against installed skill registry before worker assignment, or provide an explicit fallback policy in orchestrator-generated instructions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviewed features declared `frontend-ui-worker` in mission metadata, but worker transcripts reported unavailable skill and fell back to other skills.

rejectedObservations.observation: Second review repeated the same skill mismatch issue (`frontend-ui-worker` unavailable).
